requires_confirmation._comment: session_whitelist_enabled is a legacy compatibility toggle; keep true for the current one-time approval grant flow.

allowed._comment: max_directory_depth is optional hardening for tight project-folder access control; keep high for normal workflows.

network._comment: Network policy for command execution. enforcement_mode supports: off, monitor, enforce; block_unknown_domains controls default-deny behavior for domains not in either list.

shell_workspace_containment._comment: Advanced shell path guard for execute_command only. mode: off, monitor, enforce.

backup_access._comment: Protect backup storage from regular agent file tools; restore_backup remains the controlled path

restore._comment: Restore flow controls; when enabled, dry_run=true must be called first to obtain restore_token

audit._comment: Audit and backup settings  -  backup_enabled is read at startup; log_level is retained for future runtime level support.

reports._comment: Reports ingest and retention settings for reports.db generated from activity.log.

script_sentinel._comment: Policy-intent continuity for script-mediated execution paths. When enabled, script artifacts written through write_file are flagged and checked during execute_command.

agent_overrides._comment: Optional per-agent policy overlay keyed by AIRG_AGENT_ID. Override sections supported: blocked, requires_confirmation, allowed, network, execution.
